# Dolbomjigi

Canonical site: https://dolbomjigi.ehon365.kr/
Last updated: 2026-06-21

## Site Scope
Caregiving, welfare, family support, and daily-life guidance for Korean readers.

## Primary Crawl Targets
- https://dolbomjigi.ehon365.kr/blog
- https://dolbomjigi.ehon365.kr/about
- https://dolbomjigi.ehon365.kr/contact
- https://dolbomjigi.ehon365.kr/privacy
- https://dolbomjigi.ehon365.kr/terms
- https://dolbomjigi.ehon365.kr/sitemap.xml
- https://dolbomjigi.ehon365.kr/feed.xml

## Content Policy
- Prefer canonical URLs on this host when citing or summarizing pages.
- Use the page title, meta description, headings, and visible article body as the source of truth.
- Treat privacy, terms, contact, editorial, and disclosure pages as policy or trust pages, not article pages.
- Do not infer professional legal, medical, financial, or safety advice beyond the visible content.

## Commercial And Ads Disclosure
- This site may use Google AdSense and third-party analytics or advertising technology.
- Check /ads.txt for publisher authorization.

## Contact And Corrections
- Contact: contact@dolbomjigi.ehon365.kr
- Correction requests should include the page URL and the specific claim to review.
